name: specode
description: Lightweight spec-driven workflow: orchestrates superpowers skills per phase, lands 3 fixed docs (requirements/design/implementation-log). v3.0 added specode-distill; v3.1 closes AI-EDS P3-2; v3.2 lands FIX-1/2/3 consumer; v3.3.1 adds AI-EDS v0.9 痛点 #14 方案 D. 3.3.2 adds M8 cache vs marketplace drift hint：SessionStart hook 静默 check（解析 __file__ 取 cache 装载版本 + 找本地 pluginhub git checkout 的 marketplace.json 对照），diff 时在 additionalContext 末尾加中文 reload 提示。Requires codemap-aimemory 0.4.3+ for FIX-2 / 0.4.4+ for FIX-3d/3e.
